"error while executing SQL \"select lkp.clsfd_ga_prfl_id, ga.sum_dt, sum(ga.bounces) as bounces, sum(ga.exits) as exits, sum(ga.entrances) as entrances, sum(ga.pageviews) as pageviews, count(distinct ga.GA_VSTR_ID, ga.GA_VST_ID) as visits, count(distinct ga.GA_VSTR_ID) as uniqVistors from CLSFD_GA_PGTYPE_CATEG_LOC ga left join clsfd_ga_prfl_lkp lkp on ga.SRC_GA_PRFL_ID = lkp.SRC_GA_PRFL_ID group by lkp.clsfd_ga_prfl_id,ga.sum_dt order by lkp.clsfd_ga_prfl_id,ga.sum_dt LIMIT 50000\": From line 14, column 14 to line 14, column 29: Column 'CLSFD_GA_PRFL_ID' not found in table 'LKP'"
"From line 14, column 14 to line 14, column 29: Column 'CLSFD_GA_PRFL_ID' not found in table 'LKP'\n"

"while executing SQL: \"select lkp.clsfd_ga_prfl_id, ga.sum_dt, sum(ga.bounces) as bounces, sum(ga.exits) as exits, sum(ga.entrances) as entrances, sum(ga.pageviews) as pageviews, count(distinct ga.GA_VSTR_ID, ga.GA_VST_ID) as visits, count(distinct ga.GA_VSTR_ID) as uniqVistors from CLSFD_GA_PGTYPE_CATEG_LOC ga left join clsfd_ga_prfl_lkp lkp on ga.SRC_GA_PRFL_ID = lkp.SRC_GA_PRFL_ID group by lkp.clsfd_ga_prfl_id,ga.sum_dt order by lkp.clsfd_ga_prfl_id,ga.sum_dt LIMIT 50000\""
